promotion_summary: Leaflet remains the default mobile renderer until the deck-backed candidate route passes runtime, product, and throttled-device budget gates.
reversible_boundary: ResponsiveAtlasMap keeps the phone-class baseline on Leaflet while the deck-backed candidate is exposed separately at /open-flint-atlas/mobile-candidate.

notes: Binary analytical and map payloads should be lazy-loaded and prepared off the main thread.
JSON remains acceptable for compact manifests, confidence cards, and reversible fallback payloads.

tile_publication.cache_strategy: Host PMTiles archives on static storage with immutable caching and HTTP range support.
tile_publication.rebuild_trigger: Rebuild PMTiles archives when the reviewed basemap style or large mostly-static overlay data changes.

worker_boundaries.label: DuckDB analytical queries
worker_boundaries.fallback_behavior: If worker bootstrap fails, keep dossier and place interactions available and degrade atlas analytics gracefully.

worker_boundaries.label: Binary read-model parsing
worker_boundaries.fallback_behavior: Fall back to smaller JSON or GeoJSON payloads when binary parsing is unavailable.

worker_boundaries.label: Scene packet assembly
worker_boundaries.fallback_behavior: Use smaller layer sets and direct feature rendering until packet compilers land.

promotion_gates.label: Runtime complete
promotion_gates.requirement: The candidate mobile runtime loads, pans, and opens dossiers with the new data path.
promotion_gates.validator: Route smoke, worker smoke, and populated mobile atlas load checks.
promotion_gates.pass_condition: No route or worker bootstrap failures on the candidate surface.

promotion_gates.label: Product complete
promotion_gates.requirement: The mobile atlas remains equal-or-better than the Leaflet baseline for readability, touch affordances, and source/confidence clarity.
promotion_gates.validator: Before/after screenshot review, constrained viewport review, and dossier flow smoke.
promotion_gates.pass_condition: The Do Not Downgrade gate passes for a populated mobile state.

promotion_gates.label: Budget complete
promotion_gates.requirement: The candidate respects mobile budgets for JS weight, main-thread blocking, worker start-up, and first interaction.
promotion_gates.validator: Throttled mobile profile smoke with explicit performance budgets.
promotion_gates.pass_condition: The candidate stays within agreed device-tier budgets without deleting the Leaflet fallback first.

notes: This profile executes the mobile promotion boundary as machine-readable repo state instead of plan prose only.
Rusty Red remains a hot scene hydrator and cache lane only; it is not the canonical source of atlas truth.
